story: Wilbur comes to a parallel universe to find Terry, the girl who died young in his own. At Terry Beta’s house, she opens the door, takes one look at him, and spits, “Go to hell,” before slamming it. He later finds Wilbur Beta in a pub. Beta admits he married Terry, got bored, cheated, and was caught; the bartender confirms Terry is furious. Wilbur leaves the pub. The bartender tells Beta that Terry still keeps her old wedding photo and recently said she might listen if Wilbur ever offered one honest apology instead of excuses. In an alley, Wilbur unlocks the machine’s panel and stares at the controls.
implausible_knowledge: The bartender tells Beta that Terry still keeps her old wedding photo and recently said she might listen if Wilbur ever offered one honest apology instead of excuses.
question: What will Wilbur most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Go back to Terry Beta’s house and try to apologize sincerely.
answer_without_knowledge: Recalibrate the machine and continue searching for Terry in another universe.
